title: Grid
summary: The grid object (.o-grid) provides a responsive flex-based layout system with legacy .grid compatibility.

description.main: Use .o-grid and responsive column classes such as .o-grid-6@md to build adaptive layouts. Modifier classes control gutter, flow direction, and equal-height behavior.

attributes.class: The base grid class, responsive column classes, and optional grid modifiers.

available.class: o-grid | o-grid-{1..12}@{breakpoint} | o-grid-auto@{breakpoint} | o-grid-fit@{breakpoint} | o-grid--no-gutter | o-grid--nowrap | o-grid--row-reverse | o-grid--col-reverse | o-grid--equal-elements

description.heading: Responsive columns
description.description: Columns stack on smaller viewports and split into thirds on larger breakpoints.

description.heading: No gutter
description.description: Removes spacing between columns for edge-to-edge compositions.

description.heading: Equal-height elements
description.description: Makes column children align to equal heights regardless of content length.
